title: SimpleTpa
body:
## SimpleTPA - Lightweight & Customizable Teleport Plugin
![SimpleTpa Logo with particles and enderpearls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d524415a05b100f3e3acae38319ac4a5d33db44d.png)
SimpleTPA is a simple yet powerful teleport request plugin designed for Minecraft servers. It allows players to request and accept teleportations seamlessly while offering a range of customization options for admins.

### 📌 Features:
- **Teleport Requests**: Players can request to teleport to others using `/tpa <player>`.
- **Accept & Decline Commands**: Accept with `/tpaccept` and decline with `/tpdecline`.
- **Configurable Teleport Delay**: Set a custom delay before teleporting to prevent abuse.
- **Auto-Expiring Requests**: Requests automatically expire if not accepted within a set time.
- **Sound Effects**: Customizable sounds for teleport request, acceptance, and completion.
- **Movement Cancellation**: Moving cancels an active teleportation to prevent unfair gameplay.
- **Permissions Support**: Restrict teleportation commands to specific groups or players.
- **Fully Customizable Messages**: Modify all plugin messages in `config.yml`.
- **Tab Completion Support**: Easily find online players when using `/tpa`.
- **Lightweight & Optimized**: Designed to be efficient and non-intrusive for server performance.

🔧 **Configuration Options:**
- `settings.teleport_delay`: Time (in seconds) before teleportation occurs.
- `settings.request_timeout`: Time (in seconds) before a request expires.
- `sounds.request_received`, `sounds.accept_sound`, `sounds.teleport_completed`: Customizable sound effects.

Enhance your server’s teleportation system with SimpleTPA and provide a better experience for your players! 🚀
